database_schema.summary: Platform manages Salons, Services, Users (Admin, Owner, Staff, Customer), Bookings, Reviews, Payments.
database_schema.relationships_explained: 1 User can have 1 Staff profile and multiple Bookings. 1 Booking belongs to 1 Salon and contains multiple Services via BookingService. 1 Booking can have multiple Payments.

api_endpoints.explained: Retrieve overall platform statistics (revenue, users, bookings).
Retrieve single customer detail along with its booking history.
Generate a VietQR code for the specified booking.
Analyze performance stats (revenue, ratings) for each salon branch.
Retrieve service performance rankings (Top Booked, Top Revenue).
Retrieve detailed performance metrics for a specific staff member.
Manage global configuration including business info, branding, and booking rules.

business_rules: Staff are linked to exactly 1 Salon and have specific POSITIONS determining permissions.
Payments support CASH or VIETQR. Webhooks automatically confirm VietQR transactions.
A booking contains time slots in strings like HH:mm format.
features: Global Admin CRM for managing customers, salons, and revenues
Automatic payment system via SePay Webhook
Ratings and reviews platform for salons

patterns: Centralized Permission array in shared library
gotchas: MappedTypes trigger TS2742, avoid PartialType across monorepos and explicitly declare properties
NestJS JWT Guard missing properties if relations not included
Next.js 14.2.0 export breaks on static pages (404/500) if internal react version is > 18.2.0. Lock react to 18.2.0
Recharts charts crash SSR in Server Components, must use next/dynamic { ssr: false }
conventions: Use eslint-disable for intentionally missing deps
Use Tailwind UI classes and Lucide Icons
